meta.page_title: Never lose a letting enquiry again — 30-second auto-reply for solo agents
meta.eyebrow: For solo letting agents managing 20–80 properties who lose tenants to faster competitors

hero.headline: Never lose a letting enquiry again
hero.subheadline: Solo letting agents using this stop losing tenants to faster competitors from day one

problem.heading: You're losing £3,600 every week you wait
problem.body: Every Rightmove and Zoopla enquiry you miss while you're busy is going to a competitor who replies in minutes. Solo agents lose an average of 3 enquiries per week to slow response times — that's £3,600 in lost commission. By the time you see the notification, the tenant has already moved on.

items.title: 30-second personalised reply
items.body: Every Rightmove and Zoopla enquiry gets an instant, personalised response before your competitors even see it.

items.title: Done-for-you Rightmove integration
items.body: No setup hassle — we connect directly to your Rightmove account and start capturing leads immediately.

items.title: Built for solo agents under 80 properties
items.body: Purpose-built for your workflow, not over-engineered for large agencies that need complexity you'll never use.

proof.heading: Real solo agents are winning back leads
proof.quote: I lose enquiries if I'm not glued to my phone. By the time I see it they've gone elsewhere.
proof.body: This is the feedback from solo letting agents managing 20–80 properties. Instant reply automation closes that gap entirely — tenants get answered, you get the booking.

offer.heading: Your risk-free offer
offer.intro: Here's exactly what you get and what we guarantee:

rows.label: Offer
rows.value: Automatic 30-second replies to every Rightmove and Zoopla enquiry + done-for-you integration + 30-day lead recovery audit

rows.label: Includes
rows.value: Rightmove connection, Zoopla connection, lead recovery audit, email and portal support

rows.label: Guarantee
rows.value: Miss a single enquiry in your first 30 days and we refund everything — no questions

rows.label: Best for
rows.value: Solo letting agents managing 20–80 properties in the UK losing tenants to slow response times

items.question: Will tenants think the reply is automated?
items.answer: No. Your reply is fully personalised to their specific enquiry — they see your name, their property details, and a genuine next step. It feels like you replied instantly, because you did.

items.question: What if I'm already using another property management tool?
items.answer: We integrate directly with Rightmove and Zoopla — the platforms tenants use to find you. No need to change your existing workflow; we sit alongside it.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: 30 seconds. Connect your Rightmove account, we handle the rest. Your first enquiry reply happens automatically within 24 hours.

items.question: Is this only for Rightmove and Zoopla?
items.answer: Currently yes — these are where 90% of UK tenant enquiries come from. We chose depth over breadth to serve solo agents best.

closing.heading: Stop losing £3,600 every week
closing.body: Every day without this costs you 3 missed enquiries. Start your 30-day risk-free trial today.
closing.footer_note: 30-day money-back guarantee if you miss a single enquiry.
